questions.question: Explain the purpose of the 'default-src' directive in CSP and provide an example of its usage.
expectedPoints: Serves as fallback for other resource directives
Provides default policy when specific directives aren't defined

questions.question: Describe a phased approach to implementing CSP in a production web application, including the benefits of each phase.
expectedPoints: Start with report-only mode to identify issues
Analyze violation reports to adjust policies
Gradually tighten restrictions while testing functionality
Use nonces or hashes for inline scripts instead of 'unsafe-inline'
Monitor for false positives and adjust accordingly
Finally switch to enforcement mode with confidence
